---
title: "Volcano Plot"
author: "Ashita Jawali"
date: "2026-05-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ============================================================
# Volcano Plot for LUAD vs LUSC DEG Results
# Input: dge_luad_vs_lusc_full.csv
# Output: volcano_plot.png (publication-ready)
# ============================================================

# ── 1. Install packages if not already installed ─────────────
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("BiocManager")

packages_bioc <- c("EnhancedVolcano", "biomaRt")
packages_cran <- c("dplyr", "stringr", "ggplot2", "ggrepel")

for (pkg in packages_bioc) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    BiocManager::install(pkg)
}
for (pkg in packages_cran) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages(pkg)
}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(biomaRt)

# ── 2. Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────
df <- read.csv("C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/dge_luad_vs_lusc_full.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# ── 3. Filter out technical/non-gene rows ────────────────────
# Rows starting with "N_" are STAR alignment summary rows, not real genes
df <- df %>%
  filter(!str_starts(gene_id, "N_")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(padj)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(log2FoldChange))

cat("Rows after filtering:", nrow(df), "\n")

# ── 4. Strip Ensembl version numbers ─────────────────────────
# e.g. ENSG00000000003.15  →  ENSG00000000003
df$ensembl_clean <- str_replace(df$gene_id, "\\.\\d+$", "")

# ── 5. Map Ensembl IDs → Gene Symbols via biomaRt ─────────────
# This requires internet connection. If offline, skip to Step 5b.
cat("Connecting to Ensembl biomaRt...\n")
mart <- useEnsembl(biomart = "genes", dataset = "hsapiens_gene_ensembl")

gene_map <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol"),
  filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values     = df$ensembl_clean,
  mart       = mart
)

cat("Mapped", nrow(gene_map), "genes to HGNC symbols\n")

# Merge symbols back into main dataframe
df <- df %>%
  left_join(gene_map, by = c("ensembl_clean" = "ensembl_gene_id")) %>%
  # Where symbol is missing, fall back to the clean Ensembl ID
  mutate(gene_label = ifelse(
    is.na(hgnc_symbol) | hgnc_symbol == "",
    ensembl_clean,
    hgnc_symbol
  ))

# ── 5b. OFFLINE FALLBACK ──────────────────────────────────────
# If biomaRt fails (no internet), comment out Step 5 above
# and uncomment these two lines instead:
# library(org.Hs.eg.db)   # BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")
# df$gene_label <- mapIds(org.Hs.eg.db,
#                         keys    = df$ensembl_clean,
#                         column  = "SYMBOL",
#                         keytype = "ENSEMBL",
#                         multiVals = "first")
# df$gene_label[is.na(df$gene_label)] <- df$ensembl_clean[is.na(df$gene_label)]

# ── 6. Define significance thresholds ────────────────────────
FC_CUTOFF  <- 1.5    # log2 fold change cutoff  (±1.5 = ~2.8x fold change)
PADJ_CUTOFF <- 0.05  # adjusted p-value cutoff

# Summary of significant genes
sig_up   <- df %>% filter(log2FoldChange >  FC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF)
sig_down <- df %>% filter(log2FoldChange < -FC_CUTOFF & padj < PADJ_CUTOFF)
cat("Upregulated in LUAD (vs LUSC):", nrow(sig_up), "genes\n")
cat("Downregulated in LUAD (vs LUSC):", nrow(sig_down), "genes\n")

# ── 7. Select top genes to label on plot ─────────────────────
# Top 15 by adjusted p-value from each direction
top_genes <- bind_rows(
  sig_up   %>% arrange(padj) %>% head(15),
  sig_down %>% arrange(padj) %>% head(15)
) %>%
  pull(gene_label)

# ── 8. Publication-ready Volcano Plot ────────────────────────
p <- EnhancedVolcano(
  df,
  lab            = df$gene_label,
  x              = "log2FoldChange",
  y              = "padj",

  # Thresholds
  pCutoff        = PADJ_CUTOFF,
  FCcutoff       = FC_CUTOFF,

  # Only label the top genes defined above
  selectLab      = top_genes,

  # Axis labels — positive = higher in LUAD, negative = higher in LUSC
  xlab           = bquote(~Log[2]~ "Fold Change  (positive = LUAD, negative = LUSC)"),
  ylab           = bquote(~-Log[10]~ "Adjusted p-value"),
  title          = "Differential Gene Expression: LUAD vs LUSC",
  subtitle       = paste0(
    "Upregulated in LUAD: ", nrow(sig_up),
    "  |  Upregulated in LUSC: ", nrow(sig_down)
  ),
  caption        = paste0(
    "Thresholds: |log2FC| > ", FC_CUTOFF,
    ", padj < ", PADJ_CUTOFF
  ),

  # Point styling
  pointSize      = 1.8,
  labSize        = 3.2,
  labFace        = "bold",
  boxedLabels    = TRUE,       # puts gene labels in clean boxes
  drawConnectors = TRUE,       # lines from label to point
  widthConnectors = 0.4,
  colConnectors  = "grey40",

  # Color scheme: NS | FC only | p only | significant
  col            = c("grey70", "steelblue2", "orange2", "firebrick2"),
  colAlpha       = 0.6,

  # Legend
  legendPosition = "right",
  legendLabSize  = 10,
  legendIconSize = 4,

  # Clean theme
  gridlines.major = FALSE,
  gridlines.minor = FALSE,
  border          = "full",
  borderWidth     = 0.8,
  borderColour    = "black"
) +

  # Additional ggplot2 tweaks for publication
  theme(
    plot.title    = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40"),
    plot.caption  = element_text(size = 8,  hjust = 0.5, color = "grey50"),
    axis.title    = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    axis.text     = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.title  = element_text(size = 9,  face = "bold"),
    plot.margin   = margin(15, 15, 15, 15)
  )

# ── 9. Save the figure ───────────────────────────────────────
ggsave(
  filename = "volcano_luad_vs_lusc.png",
  plot     = p,
  width    = 12,
  height   = 9,
  dpi      = 300,          # 300 DPI = journal standard
  bg       = "white"
)

cat("\nSaved: volcano_luad_vs_lusc.png\n")

# Also save as PDF for vector format (better for some journals)
ggsave(
  filename = "volcano_luad_vs_lusc.pdf",
  plot     = p,
  width    = 12,
  height   = 9
)

cat("Saved: volcano_luad_vs_lusc.pdf\n")

# ── 10. Quick summary table of top hits ──────────────────────
cat("\n── Top 10 upregulated in LUAD ──\n")
sig_up %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  select(gene_label, log2FoldChange, padj, baseMean) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  print()

cat("\n── Top 10 upregulated in LUSC ──\n")
sig_down %>%
  arrange(padj) %>%
  select(gene_label, log2FoldChange, padj, baseMean) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  print()
```
